title: nepeta rugosa
intro: Nepeta rugosa, also known as Woolly Catmint, is a perennial herb native to China and Mongolia, characterized by its grayish-green leaves and blue-purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Nepeta rugosa include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Nepeta rugosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb for topical applications, making it a versatile and useful addition to natural remedies.
